studyName: WGS of a malignant GCT with metabolic response to pazopanib

tables.description: Sample ID, body site where sample was obtained, analyte type, tumor status of sample, histological type, primary tumor location, tumor stage, tumor grade, tumor treatment, genotyping center, sequencing center of participants with or without malignant granular cell tumor and involved in the "Whole-Genome Sequencing (WGS) of a Malignant Granular Vell Tumor (GCT) with Metabolic Response to Pazopanib" project.

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: GENOTYPING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted genotyping

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: PRIMARY_METASTATIC_TUMOR
variables.description: Primary tumor, metastasis, or transformed cell line

variables.name: SEQUENCING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted sequencing

variables.name: TUMOR_TREATMENT
variables.description: Type of tumor treatment for sample

tables.description: Subject ID, consent group, subject source, source subject ID, and affection status of participants with or without malignant granular cell tumor and involved in the "Whole-Genome Sequencing (WGS) of a Malignant Granular Vell Tumor (GCT) with Metabolic Response to Pazopanib" project.

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID used in the Source Repository

tables.description: Subject ID, sample ID, sample source, source sample ID, and sample use variable of participants with or without malignant granular cell tumor and involved in the "Whole-Genome Sequencing (WGS) of a Malignant Granular Vell Tumor (GCT) with Metabolic Response to Pazopanib" project.

variables.name: SOURCE_SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID used in the Source Repository
